ns0:entry.ns0:title: 1Panel-dev/CordysCRM
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/1Panel-dev/CordysCRM
Language: java
🔥 Cordys CRM 是新一代开源 AI CRM 系统，融合信息化、数字化与智能化，支持私有化部署，Skills 技能现已上线，全面驱动 OpenClaw AI 助理。

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Snailclimb/JavaGuide
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Snailclimb/JavaGuide
Language: java
Java 面试 & 后端通用面试指南，覆盖计算机基础、数据库、分布式、高并发、系统设计与 AI 应用开发

ns0:entry.ns0:title: StarRocks/starrocks
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/StarRocks/starrocks
Language: java
The world's fastest open query engine for sub-second analytics both on and off the data lakehouse. With the flexibility to support nearly any scenario, StarRocks provides best-in-class performance for multi-dimensional analytics, real-time analytics, and ad-hoc queries. A Linux Foundation project.

Language: java
Open-source, ad-free Android multimedia recorder with background video recording, screen recording, live streaming, and remote camera control

Enterprise-grade, commercial-friendly agentic workflow platform for building next-generation SuperAgents.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: jd-opensource/joyagent-jdgenie
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/jd-opensource/joyagent-jdgenie
Language: java
开源的端到端产品级通用智能体

ns0:entry.ns0:title: jeecgboot/JeecgBoot
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/jeecgboot/JeecgBoot
Language: java
AI低代码平台，支持「低代码 + 零代码」双模式：零代码 5 分钟搭建业务系统，低代码模式一键生成前后端代码。 内置AI 应用，支持AI聊天、知识库、流程编排、MCP与插件，支持各种模型。Skills能力实现：一句话画流程图、设计表单、生成系统。 引领 AI生成→在线配置→代码生成→手工合并的开发模式，解决Java项目80%的重复工作，快速提高效率，又不失灵活性。

ns0:entry.ns0:title: keycloak/keycloak
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/keycloak/keycloak
Language: java
Open Source Identity and Access Management For Modern Applications and Services

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/langchain4j/langchain4j-examples
Language: java

ns0:entry.ns0:title: nageoffer/ragent
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/nageoffer/ragent
Language: java
企业级 Agentic RAG 智能体 - 全链路覆盖文档解析、多路检索、意图识别、问题重写、会话记忆、MCP 工具调用与深度思考。面向真实业务场景，从 0 到 1 完整工程实现。
